estimate.title: Estimate
estimate.grade_a: Grade A — Excellent condition. Surfaces are clean, smooth, and in good repair. Minimal preparation needed.
estimate.grade_b: Grade B — Good condition. Minor imperfections, small cracks or nail pops. Standard preparation.
estimate.grade_c: Grade C — Fair condition. Visible wear, peeling, or damage. Extended preparation required.
estimate.grade_d: Grade D — Poor condition. Significant damage, extensive peeling, or structural surface issues. Full restoration prep.
estimate.prep_basic: Basic — Light cleaning, spot sanding. Suitable for surfaces in good condition.
estimate.prep_standard: Homeowner Standard — Full cleaning, sanding, caulking, and minor patching. The most common level.
estimate.prep_superior: Superior — Extensive sanding, priming, multi-step patching, and caulking. For surfaces with moderate wear.
estimate.prep_restoration: Restoration Grade — Complete surface restoration including scraping, stripping, skim-coating, and heavy repair.
